instructions: Work this queue before broad historical 1kuji research.
Use only labeled official 1kuji campaign pages or captured official evidence.
Fill templates only after manual confirmation; no campaign metadata is auto-applied.

Copy server/ichiban_kuji_metadata_confirmed_rows.template.json to server/ichiban_kuji_metadata_confirmed_rows.json, fill manual_value and confirmation flags, then run tools/import_confirmed_ichiban_metadata_rows.py.
